changelog:
📢 1.0.0-beta4: Made some UI adjustments and fixed a few minor issues.

[🟢=New Feature, 🟠=Feature Update, 🟣=Fix]

Here are some improvements from the last version of Deskplay:

🟢 Added: Added audio hardware information to system information.
🟢 Added: Added the settings option to enable/disable mouse hover events.
🟠 Update: Updated the fullscreen transition to make it smoother.
🟠 Update: Updated the settings UI to make it more intuitive.
🟣 Fix: Fixed the Linux installer for some distros. It now includes the libxcb.
🟣 Fix: Fixed some minor issues from game frontend UI.
🟣 Fix: Fixed text break line from update checker dialog.

I hope you enjoy Deskplay. Keep gaming.
